seoTitle: Ellis Lane vs Elrington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ellis Lane and Elrington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ellis Lane vs Elrington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ellis Lane and Elrington.
heading: Ellis Lane vs Elrington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ellis Lane, New South Wales and Elrington, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elrington has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ellis Lane (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ellis Lane or Elrington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ellis Lane has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Elrington scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ellis Lane scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Elrington scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ellis Lane or Elrington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elrington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
